protocol.mechanism: persistent Preisach price relays accumulate per-domain taker-flow scars; a coherent multi-relay avalanche follows release of previously opposing flow
protocol.entry: completed 5m close signal enters next 5m open
protocol.contamination_note: all pre-2024 rows are exploratory; 2023 is inspected internal selection and 2024+ remained sealed
protocol.support_only_design_probe: before outcome evaluation, 7d/q90 produced only 4 fit signals; 12h/q80 was frozen to meet statistical-support requirements without reading returns
